uk: 24🕂 Свв. мучеників Бориса і Гліба, у святому хрещенні названих Романом і Давидом
saints.en: Sts. Martyrs Boris & Gleb, named Roman & David in Baptism. St. Great Martyr Christina. Ven. Sharbel

rubrics:
Вечірня: «Блажен муж». На «Господи взиваю» – 6 стихир мчч., Слава: мчч., І нині: богородичний-догмат за гласом «Слава». Вхід. Прокімен дня і три читання мчч.: Іс. 43:9-14, Муд. 3:1-9, Муд. 5:15-6:3. Стиховня ціла мчч., зі своїми приспівами, Сл.: мчч., І нині: богород. з воскрес. стиховні за гласом «Слава». Тропар мчч., Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тропаря мчч. Відпуст великий з помин. служби мчч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар мчч. (2), Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тропаря мчч. Катизма чергова з сідальними мчч., також полієлей з величаннями. Степенна 4-го гласу, перший антифон. Прокімен, Єв. Лк. 106 зач.; 21:12-19. Пс. 50, і стихира мчч. Канон Богородиці і мчч. По 9-ій – світильний мчч. На Хвалитних – 4 стихири мчч., Слава: мчч., І нині: богород. за гласом наславника. По великому славослов'ї з трисвятим – тропар мчч., Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тропаря мчч. Відпуст великий з помин. служби мчч.
Часи: на всіх – тропар і кондак мчч.
Літургія: все – тільки мчч. Апостол і євангелія спочатку – Ряд.: Ап. – 1 Кор. 157 зач.; 14, 26-40. Єв. – Мт. 83 зач.; 21, 12-14. 17-20, а відтак Мчч.: Ап. – Рим. 99 зач.; 8, 28-39. Єв. – Ів. 52 зач.; 15, 17 – 16, 2.

troparion_en.text: Righteous passion-bearers and true fulfillers of the Gospel of Christ, / chaste Boris and guileless Gleb, / you did not resist the attacks of your brother, the enemy, / when he killed your bodies but could not touch your souls. / Therefore, let the evil lover of power mourn / while you rejoice with the angels standing before the Holy Trinity. / Pray that those who honor your memory may be pleasing to God, / and that all Orthodox Christians may be saved.

kontakion_en.text: Today your most glorious memory shines forth, / noble participants in the passion of Christ, holy Boris and Gleb, / for you call us together to sing praises to Christ our God! / Praying to Him before your sacred images, / we receive the gift of healing by your prayers, / for you are indeed divine healers.

matched_oca_saint: Martyrs and Passion-Bearers Boris and Gleb

oca_saints.name: Martyrs and Passion-Bearers Boris and Gleb

troparion.text: Righteous passion-bearers and true fulfillers of the Gospel of Christ, / chaste Boris and guileless Gleb, / you did not resist the attacks of your brother, the enemy, / when he killed your bodies but could not touch your souls. / Therefore, let the evil lover of power mourn / while you rejoice with the angels standing before the Holy Trinity. / Pray that those who honor your memory may be pleasing to God, / and that all Orthodox Christians may be saved.

kontakion.text: Today your most glorious memory shines forth, / noble participants in the passion of Christ, holy Boris and Gleb, / for you call us together to sing praises to Christ our God! / Praying to Him before your sacred images, / we receive the gift of healing by your prayers, / for you are indeed divine healers.

troparion.text:
(Podoben: “Come, let us worship the Word...”)
You abandoned your father's error, most revered one,  / you received divine illumination,  / and were betrothed to Christ as a glorious virgin;  / therefore, you contested steadfastly and overcame the Enemy, O Great Martyr Christina. /  Pray unceasingly that we may receive great mercy.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You were lifted up on the Cross...”)
You appeared as a luminous dove with golden wings,  / and flew to the heights of heaven, O revered Christina, and came to rest. /  We faithfully celebrate your glorious feast  / and venerate the shrine of your relics, /  from which divine healing of souls and bodies flows abundantly for all.

oca_saints.name: Venerable Polycarp, Archimandrite of the Kiev Far Caves

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Polycarp, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Hilarion, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!
